# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRY: "30d"
  SECURITY_POLICY: "strict"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - mkdir -p build/bin
    - echo "binary content" > build/bin/app
    - echo "config content" > build/config.yaml
    - echo "Build completed"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRY
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml
  security:
    policy: $SECURITY_POLICY
    scan:
      - type: sast
      - type: dependency
  only:
    - main

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts..."
    - ls -la
    - echo "Executing deployment..."
    - cat build/bin/app
    - cat build/config.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  security:
    policy: $SECURITY_POLICY
    scan:
      - type: secret
  only:
    - main

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts..."
    - ls -la
    - echo "Executing production deployment..."
    - cat build/bin/app
    - cat build/config.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  security:
    policy: $SECURITY_POLICY
    scan:
      - type: secret
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
